title: Rep's Battle Botanist
description: A mod expanding combat using plants!
body:
## About
 #### !DISCLAIMER! THIS MOD IS STILL IN EARLY DEVELOPMENT
Battle Botanist is a mod that try's to expand combat using plants! This includes growing sentry's, crafting weapons, or finding them via exploration. There is not a lot in the mod at the moment. Although, I plan to roll out updates over time, so make sure to follow!


### Credit
Programmer/Designer/Artist : Repook

Artist: Ben

### Installation Requirements
Fabric API

This is a strictly fabric mod. I have no plan to port the mod. I someone else is willing to port it, please ask me first.

### Other
No backports are planned

I will update it to later versions
